Top Stories.title: Breast cancer survival rate up, but India lags behind rich nations: WHO
Top Stories.summary: India's breast cancer survival rate stands at sixty-five point seven percent. This figure is lower than the global median survival rate. Strengthening detection and treatment access is essential for better results.

India.title: PM praises Australia social ban for U-16s, hinting at similar curbs

This move follows growing government focus on online safety for minors. Several Indian states have also proposed similar restrictions on social media use. Nationwide implementation faces significant challenges due to India's vast internet user population.
